commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=55472fe14ad4a969fab55ec78db535006929e8a7)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds SDK/docs/changelog deprecation wording, compatibility registry metadata, plugin-inspect warnings, and guardrail tests for legacy memory-specific embedding provider registration.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Not applicable as a user bug report, but the review finding is source-reproducible from the current registry and status-report data flow.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer handling because the PR is protected and stacked, contributor real behavior proof is missing, and the remaining work is tied to SDK deprecation timing.

target.title: Deprecate memory-specific embedding provider registration
target.body:
## Summary

- marks the memory-specific embedding provider registration seam as deprecated compatibility
- surfaces non-bundled `memoryEmbeddingProviders` / `registerMemoryEmbeddingProvider` usage through plugin compatibility notices
- updates SDK docs and adds guardrails so new bundled plugins do not add more legacy memory embedding provider registrations

## Verification

Behavior addressed: old memory-specific embedding provider registration now remains compatible but is visible as deprecated for plugin authors.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw worktree with focused status, compat registry, and package guardrail tests.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/status.test.ts src/plugins/compat/registry.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts src/plugins/status.ts src/plugins/status.test.ts src/plugins/compat/registry.ts src/plugins/compat/registry.test.ts src/plugins/status.test-helpers.ts src/plugin-sdk/memory-core-host-engine-embeddings.ts`; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check CHANGELOG.md docs/plugins/adding-capabilities.md docs/plugins/manifest.md docs/plugins/sdk-migration.md docs/plugins/sdk-overview.md docs/plugins/sdk-provider-plugins.md docs/plugins/sdk-subpaths.md src/plugin-sdk/memory-core-host-engine-embeddings.ts src/plugins/compat/registry.test.ts src/plugins/compat/registry.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts src/plugins/status.test-helpers.ts src/plugins/status.test.ts src/plugins/status.ts`; `git diff --check`
Evidence after fix: 3 Vitest files passed with 49 tests; oxlint passed; oxfmt check passed; diff whitespace check passed.
Observed result after fix: external/workspace plugins using the old memory embedding provider seam receive a compatibility warning, bundled migration debt stays out of normal user warnings, and new bundled legacy registrations are blocked by guardrail allowlists.
What was not tested: full build and full changed-check suite; this is a stacked draft PR and CI should carry broad-package coverage.
target.author: mbelinky

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
